tasks.label: AEO.02 - Capability Architect: Definieer Agent Boundary
args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $agent = 'capability-architect'; $intent = 'definieer-agent-boundary'; $targetAgent = '${input:targetAgentName}'; $vsf = '${input:valueStreamFase}'; $beschrijving = '${input:korteBeschrijving}'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $agent; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$agent.$intent.md"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python $generator --agent $agent --intent $intent -p agent_naam=$targetAgent -p value_stream_fase=$vsf -p korte_beschrijving=$beschrijving --execution-file $filename; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { code $filename }

args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $agent = 'agent-smeder'; $intent = 'leg-vast-agent-charter'; $targetAgent = '${input:targetAgentName}'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $agent; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$agent.$intent.md"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python $generator --agent $agent --intent $intent -p agent_naam=$targetAgent --execution-file $filename; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { code $filename }

tasks.label: AEO.02 - Task Drafter: Realiseer VSCode Tasks JSON
args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $agent = 'task-drafter'; $intent = 'realiseer-vscode-tasks-json'; $targetAgent = '${input:targetAgentName}'; $intentFilter = '${input:taskDrafterIntent}'; $contractFilter = '${input:taskDrafterAgentContract}'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $agent; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$agent.$intent.md"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; $cmd = @($generator,'--agent',$agent,'--intent',$intent,'-p',"agent_naam=$targetAgent",'--execution-file',$filename); if ($intentFilter) { $cmd += @('-p',"intent=$intentFilter") }; if ($contractFilter) { $cmd += @('-p',"agent_contract=$contractFilter") }; python @cmd; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { code $filename }

tasks.label: Task Drafter: Realiseer VSCode Tasks JSON per Value-Stream Fase
args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $phase = '${input:taskDrafterValueStreamFase}'; $taskAgent = 'task-drafter'; $taskIntent = 'realiseer-vscode-tasks-json'; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; $phasePrefix = $phase.Split('.')[0]; $root = Join-Path 'artefacten' $phasePrefix; if (-not (Test-Path $root)) { Write-Error "Value stream map niet gevonden: $root"; exit 1 }; $boundaryFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*.agent-boundary.md' -and $_.Directory.Name -like "$phase.*" }; if (-not $boundaryFiles) { Write-Error "Geen boundaries gevonden voor fase $phase"; exit 1 }; foreach ($boundary in $boundaryFiles) { $agentName = $boundary.BaseName -replace '\.agent-boundary$',''; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $taskAgent + $agentName; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$taskAgent.$taskIntent.md"; python $generator --agent $taskAgent --intent $taskIntent -p agent_naam=$agentName -p value_stream_fase=$phase --execution-file $filename; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error "Generatie mislukt voor $agentName"; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Write-Host "[OK] gegenereerd voor $agentName -> $filename" }; Write-Host "Klaar: $($boundaryFiles.Count) agent(s) verwerkt voor fase $phase"

tasks.label: Canon: pull + copy hash
tasks.command: $canonRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-canon'; if (-not (Test-Path $canonRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-canon.git $canonRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $canonRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; git -C $canonRoot rev-parse --short HEAD | Set-Clipboard

tasks.label: Agent: Execute (Generate + Save)
args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $agent = '${input:agentName}'; $intent = '${input:intentName}'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $agent; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$agent.$intent.md"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python $generator --agent $agent --intent $intent --minimal --log-mode compact --bootstrap-quiet --execution-file $filename; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { code $filename }

tasks.label: Agent: Execute Turbo (Skip Bootstrap)
args: -Command

$repoRoot = Join-Path $PWD '..\mandarin-agents'; if (-not (Test-Path $repoRoot)) { git clone https://github.com/hans-blok/mandarin-agents.git $repoRoot | Out-Null }; git -C $repoRoot pull --ff-only | Out-Null; $generator = Join-Path $repoRoot 'scripts/generate_instructions.py'; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $agent = '${input:agentName}'; $intent = '${input:intentName}'; $hashInput = $timestamp + $agent; $md5 = [System.Security.Cryptography.MD5]::Create(); $hashBytes = $md5.ComputeHash([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($hashInput)); $hash = [System.BitConverter]::ToString($hashBytes).Replace('-','').Substring(0,4).ToLower(); $filename = "agent-execution/$hash.$agent.$intent.md"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python $generator --agent $agent --intent $intent --minimal --log-mode compact --bootstrap-quiet --skip-bootstrap --execution-file $filename; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { code $filename }

inputs.description: Naam van de agent (bijv. core-framework-architect, hypothese-vormer)
Value-stream fase voor batch-overhaal (bijv. aeo.02, fnd.02, sfw.03)
Korte beschrijving van de agent capability (1-3 zinnen)
Pad naar bronbestand (input voor core-framework-architect intent)
